# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read().split()
    N = int(input[0])
    H = list(map(int, input[1:N+1]))
    
    first_height = H[0]
    result = -1
    
    for i in range(1, N):
        if H[i] > first_height:
            result = i + 1  # Convert to 1-based index
            break
    
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
